mapper.insert: insert into wallet_entry(txn_id, account_id, direction, amount, balance_after) values(#{txnId}, #{accountId}, #{direction}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter})
mapper.select: select entry_id, txn_id, account_id, direction, amount, balance_after, create_time from wallet_entry where txn_id = #{txnId} order by entry_id asc
